message:
feat: Optimize memory for 16GB Apple Silicon systems

- Detect Apple Silicon (ARM + macOS) for unified memory awareness
- Force Q4_0 KV cache on 16GB systems (75% memory savings)
- Use single cell on memory-constrained systems
- Reduce batch size to 256 on 16GB to prevent OOM
- Reserve 2GB headroom for OS and scratch buffers
- Dynamic context sizing based on available memory
